response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development skills with extensive experience in distributed systems, cloud technologies, and leadership through mentoring and open-source contributions. However, the role requires deep C++ expertise (8+ years) and a focus on cloud compute platforms, which are not prominently featured in his resume.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., Dunnhumby media, Shopify).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical talks (e.g., Selenium Course, Refactoring Dojos).
Diverse technical background with open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective).
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of C++ experience; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang.
Limited explicit experience with cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture.
Technical leadership roles are not clearly aligned with the cloud/DevOps focus of the position.
